deployHtml:
apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: minio
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: minio-14-1-2
      name: minio
      namespace: minio
      values: |
        minio:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/minio
    - template: milvus-5-0-14
      name: milvus
      namespace: milvus
      values: |
        milvus:
          image:
            all:
              tag: v2.6.0
          cluster:
            enabled: false
          pulsarv3:
            enabled: false
          standalone:
            messageQueue: woodpecker
          woodpecker:
            enabled: true
          streaming:
            enabled: true
    - template: strimzi-kafka-operator-0-47-0
      name: strimzi-kafka-operator
      namespace: kafka
      values: |
        strimzi-kafka-operator:
          revisionHistoryLimit: 4
    - template: postgresql-18-3-0
      name: postgresql
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        postgresql:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/postgresql
    - template: redis-0-2-0
      name: redis
      namespace: redis
    - template: influxdb2-2-1-2
      name: influxdb2
      namespace: influxdb

contentHtml:
AI Data Platform

A composable data platform for AI teams needing reliable storage, messaging, and workflow orchestration for training pipelines. Supports the full data lifecycle from ingestion to model-ready datasets.

Install template to k0rdent

helm upgrade --install minio oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=minio:14.1.2" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install milvus oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=milvus:5.0.14" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install strimzi-kafka-operator oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=strimzi-kafka-operator:0.47.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install postgresql oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=postgresql:18.3.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install redis oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=redis:0.2.0" \
  -n kcm-system
helm upgrade --install influxdb2 oci://ghcr.io/k0rdent/catalog/charts/kgst \
  --set "chart=influxdb2:2.1.2" \
  -n kcm-system

Verify service template

kubectl get servicetemplates -A
# NAMESPACE    NAME                            VALID
# kcm-system   minio-14-1-2                    true
# kcm-system   milvus-5-0-14                   true
# kcm-system   strimzi-kafka-operator-0-47-0   true
# kcm-system   postgresql-18-3-0               true
# kcm-system   redis-0-2-0                     true
# kcm-system   influxdb2-2-1-2                 true

Deploy service

apiVersion: k0rdent.mirantis.com/v1beta1
kind: MultiClusterService
metadata:
  name: minio
spec:
  clusterSelector:
    matchLabels:
      group: demo
  serviceSpec:
    services:
    - template: minio-14-1-2
      name: minio
      namespace: minio
      values: |
        minio:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/minio
    - template: milvus-5-0-14
      name: milvus
      namespace: milvus
      values: |
        milvus:
          image:
            all:
              tag: v2.6.0
          cluster:
            enabled: false
          pulsarv3:
            enabled: false
          standalone:
            messageQueue: woodpecker
          woodpecker:
            enabled: true
          streaming:
            enabled: true
    - template: strimzi-kafka-operator-0-47-0
      name: strimzi-kafka-operator
      namespace: kafka
      values: |
        strimzi-kafka-operator:
          revisionHistoryLimit: 4
    - template: postgresql-18-3-0
      name: postgresql
      namespace: postgresql
      values: |
        postgresql:
          global:
            security:
              allowInsecureImages: true
          image:
            repository: bitnamilegacy/postgresql
    - template: redis-0-2-0
      name: redis
      namespace: redis
    - template: influxdb2-2-1-2
      name: influxdb2
      namespace: influxdb

Verify MinIO object storage

# Port-forward MinIO console
kubectl port-forward svc/minio -n minio 9001:9001

# Access MinIO Console at http://localhost:9001
# Default credentials are set in the Helm values

Verify Milvus vector database

# Port-forward Milvus
kubectl port-forward svc/milvus -n milvus 19530:19530

# Test connection with Python
python3 -c "
from pymilvus import connections
connections.connect('default', host='localhost', port='19530')
print('Milvus connected')
"

Verify Kafka streaming

# Create a test topic
kubectl exec -n kafka -it kafka-cluster-kafka-0 -- \
  bin/kafka-topics.sh --create --topic test-topic \
  --bootstrap-server localhost:9092

# List topics
kubectl exec -n kafka -it kafka-cluster-kafka-0 -- \
  bin/kafka-topics.sh --list \
  --bootstrap-server localhost:9092
